books.title: LA CONSTITUCIÓN HK23
books.desc: El libro de leyes del universo: los 5 principios, las leyes L0–L13, y cómo evoluciona todo.
books.md:
# HK23 Constitution — the governing layer of Vice OS

Vice OS is the **body**: a real, deployed, graph-native system (Supabase `hk23`, React app, cosmos, worlds, marketplace). This folder is its **brain**: the laws it obeys, the way it evolves, and the agent that tends it.

> Full canonical constitution (Charter, Artifact, Ontology, Spark Theory, Governance) lives in the
> Cowork **HK23 OS** project. This is the operative summary that governs Vice OS directly.

## The five principles
1. Probability over preference — *"what increases the probability that a spark becomes reality?"*
2. Nothing is disposable — nothing deleted, nothing dismissed.
3. Everything is versioned.
4. The universal object is the **Artifact**; the **Idea** is the object of purpose.
5. Fastest path to a working product; speed never licenses dismissing a spark.

## The laws (the physics) — L0–L13
Purpose · Identity · Persistence · Versioning · Reference · Relation · Provenance · Confidence ·
Justification · Evolution · Measurability · Self-Description · **L12 Conservation of Potential** ·
**L13 Non-Coercion of Emergence** (the system suggests; the human decides).

## How Vice OS maps to this
See **`MAPPING.md`** — the constitution and the Supabase schema independently converged (entities+relationships, event-sourced activity_log, `source: ai|manual` = Similarity vs Resonance, archived≠delete, the flow torus).

## How it evolves — the promotion ladder (GOVERNANCE)
Reality Observation → Engineering Pattern → Review Note → ADR → Blueprint Revision → Constitutional Amendment.
Burden of proof rises at each step. **Vice OS is reality** — what works here can promote constitution ideas upward; what breaks here corrects them.

## The brain
**`../hk23-brain/aria.mjs`** — Aria reads the live graph and proposes `ai_suggested` connections (Similarity). *You* confirm the meaningful ones to `source='manual'` (Resonance). She proposes; you decide (L13).

books.title: CONSTITUCIÓN ↔ VICE OS — EL MAPEO
books.desc: Cómo la constitución y el sistema real convergieron. El documento técnico del canon.
books.md:
# HK23 Constitution ↔ Vice OS (Supabase `hk23`) — Mapping

> How the HK23 OS constitution (built in Cowork) maps onto the live Vice OS schema.
> Vice OS is the **body** (real, deployed). The constitution is the **brain** (laws, governance, Aria).
> Canonical constitution lives in the Cowork "HK23 OS" project; this maps it onto reality.

## The headline: you built the same model twice, and it agrees

| Constitution primitive / law | Vice OS Supabase (`hk23` schema) | Status |
|---|---|---|
| **Artifact** (universal Node) | `entities` (level node…cosmos; kind idea/project/book/product/agent/asset) | ✅ match |
| **Relationship** (typed Edge) | `relationships` (type, strength, source) | ✅ match |
| **Event / Outcome** (event-sourced truth, L2/L3) | `activity_log` (append rows; time-decayed gravity, half-life ~7d) | ✅ match |
| **Similarity (machine) vs Resonance (human)** — Review Note **O5** | `relationships.source = 'ai' \| 'manual'` + type `ai_suggested` | ✅ **already shipped** |
| **L7 Confidence** | `relationships.strength` (0–1) | ✅ match |
| **L6 Provenance** | `entities.owner_id`, `relationships.source`, `created_at` | ✅ match |
| **L2 Persistence** (archive ≠ delete) | `entity_state` includes `fading/dead/archived` | ⚠️ partial — schema has `ON DELETE CASCADE`; adopt a no-hard-delete policy |
| **L3 Versioning** | `updated_at` trigger + `activity_log` | ⚠️ gap — no full version history table |
| **creates-chain → Revenue** | `relationships` (`derived_from`,`monetizes`) + flow `stage-revenue` + `listings` (Etsy) | ✅ match |
| **Spark / Potential** (pre-artifact, L12/L13) | closest = `entity_state='star'`; no explicit `potential` | ⚠️ add `potential` state (or treat `star` as Spark) |
| **L8 Justification** ("why do I exist?") | `entities.summary` / `meta` | ⚠️ gap — add an explicit `why_exists` |
| **Lifecycle** (Spark→…→Project→Reborn) | `entity_state` star→growing→alive→fading→dead→archived (+ Reborn = revive) | ✅ richer on Vice OS side |
| **Flow** (macro lifecycle) | `flow_stages`: Ideas→Creation→Products→Community→Revenue→Resources→**(loop)** | ✅ match (this is the creates-chain + Reborn torus) |
| **L1 Identity** (immutable id) | `entities.id` uuid | ✅ — but Vice OS uses uuid, not `HK23-XXXX` |

## What reality (Vice OS) teaches the constitution → candidate amendments (governance ladder)
1. **5-level containment**: Cosmos ▸ Multiverse ▸ Galaxy ▸ System ▸ Node — richer than the constitution's flat node model. *Reality Observation → propose to Ontology (HK23-0003).*
2. **Gravity / time-decay** as the activity & value metric (`rollup_activity`, half-life). The constitution's "value is computed from outcomes" (L10) gains a concrete mechanism. *Promote toward Blueprint Revision.*
3. **State nuance** (`fading`, `dead`) beyond archive — a graceful decay model. *Reality Observation.*

## What the constitution gives Vice OS (gaps to close)
- An explicit **`potential` Spark state** (so latent ideas are first-class and exempt from pressure — L12).
- A **`why_exists` justification** field (L8 / Self-Awareness Protocol).
- A **version history** (L3) — even a light `entity_versions` table.
- A **no-hard-delete policy** (L2) — prefer `state='archived'` over `DELETE` despite the cascade.
- **Governance**: the promotion ladder (Reality Observation → … → Constitutional Amendment) so Vice OS evolves deliberately.

## Identity reconciliation
Keep **uuid** as the canonical primary key (it's deployed). Treat `HK23-XXXX` as an optional human-readable **slug/alias** on `entities.slug`. Both satisfy L1 (immutable, unique); no migration needed.

## Single source of truth
**Supabase is the store. The constitution governs it. The Cowork event-log kernel was the proof-of-laws, not a competing database.** No data fork.

books.title: HK23 BRAIN — ARIA
books.desc: La capa reflexiva del universo: la agente que propone conexiones sobre el grafo vivo.
books.md:
# HK23 Brain — Aria (resident in Vice OS)

The reflective layer the constitution gives Vice OS. Aria reads the live `hk23` graph and **proposes**
connections; **you** decide which are real. She never forces, never deletes (Laws L12/L13; Review Note O5).

## Run (dry-run — works now, no DB needed)
```bash
node hk23-brain/aria.mjs
```
Prints proposed `ai_suggested` (Similarity) links over a sample graph.

## Run against your live Supabase
```bash
SUPABASE_URL="https://<project>.supabase.co" SUPABASE_KEY="<service-or-anon-key>" \
  node hk23-brain/aria.mjs            # read + propose (no writes)

SUPABASE_URL=… SUPABASE_KEY=… node hk23-brain/aria.mjs --write   # persist as ai_suggested
```
Aria writes only `source='ai'` / `type='ai_suggested'` edges. Promoting one to `source='manual'`
(Resonance) is **your** act — that's the human validation that turns machine similarity into meaning.

## Why this is the connection
This is the constitution's **brain** operating on Vice OS's **body**: same O5 distinction the Supabase
schema already encodes (`source: ai | manual`), now driven by an agent. Next: embeddings for smarter
similarity, and wiring Aria's daily run into the Vice OS cosmos.

books.title: VICE OS vs ATLAS-X
books.desc: Qué es cada sistema y por qué existen los dos.
books.md:
# Vice OS  ≠  ATLAS X

**This folder is VICE OS** — the system *you* live in (your second brain + the HK23 cosmos you run your world from). Internal. Not for sale.

**ATLAS X** is the *product* you sell — a packaged "Personal Intelligence OS" for other people. It lives in `~/Documents/Claude/Projects/ATLAS X/`.

> Vice OS is the source. ATLAS X is the product distilled from it.
> Gut-check before filing anything: **for me → Vice OS · for someone who paid me → ATLAS X.**

Full boundary + rules: `~/Documents/Claude/Projects/ATLAS X/00-BOUNDARY-vice-os-vs-atlas-x.md`

books.title: GUÍA DE LANZAMIENTO — CHECKLIST
books.desc: El checklist operativo para lanzar un producto del universo a la tienda.
books.md:
# HK23 Etsy — Manual Launch Checklist

Everything you need to go live and sell **today**, without the API key. The agent automates this later; this gets you selling now.

## ✅ What's already prepared for you
| Asset | Where |
|-------|-------|
| **High-res art (243 JPGs, 1856×2464)** | `~/Desktop/HK23-Etsy-Fullres/` — upload these as listing photos + the buyer's download file |
| **Listing text** (title, 13 tags, description, price) | http://localhost:8765/etsy-studio.html — COPY buttons |
| **Shop About / policies / FAQ** | `etsy-exports/SHOP-COPY.md` |
| **10 quick preview JPGs (624px)** | `etsy-exports/HK23-mj-01..10.jpg` (backup / fast option) |

---

## Step 1 — Finish opening the shop (~10 min)
- Complete: **Shop preferences → Name → How you'll get paid → Billing → Security**.
- Set **Country = Chile**, **Currency = USD** (wider reach for digital art).
- Don't overthink the name — you can change it later.

## Step 2 — Brand the shop (~10 min)
- Paste the **Announcement** and **About** from `SHOP-COPY.md`.
- Add a banner + logo (use any HK23 art from `~/Desktop/HK23-Etsy-Fullres/`).
- Set **Shop policies** from `SHOP-COPY.md` (digital = no returns, instant delivery, personal-use license).

## Step 3 — Publish your first listings (~3 min each)
For each piece (start with 3–5 of your strongest):
1. Etsy → **Create a listing**.
2. **Photos:** upload the matching high-res JPG from `~/Desktop/HK23-Etsy-Fullres/`.
3. **Title / Tags / Description:** copy from **etsy-studio.html** (the COPY buttons).
4. **Type:** Digital · **Category:** Digital Prints · **Who made it:** I did.
5. **Price:** as shown in the studio ($6–8.50).
6. **Digital file (the download):** attach the same high-res JPG (or a print bundle).
7. **Publish.** 🎉

## Step 4 — You're live
Share your shop link. You're selling.

---

## When the API key activates
1. `cd ~/vice-os-artifact/etsy-agent` → paste keystring in `config.json`
2. `npm run oauth` → click Allow
3. `npm run taxonomy` → set the Digital Prints id in config
4. `npm run publish` → the agent publishes the rest **automatically**.

The manual listings you made by hand stay live; the agent just adds the rest and runs on schedule.

---

## Tips to sell faster
- **Bundle option:** offer a "set of 3 prints" listing at a higher price — boosts average order.
- **Consistency:** publish a few listings per week; Etsy rewards active shops.
- **SEO:** the titles/tags are already keyword-optimized — don't water them down.
- **Mockups (later):** framed-on-a-wall mockups convert better than raw art; we can generate these next.

books.title: GUÍA DE COPY — LA TIENDA
books.desc: El copy maestro de la tienda: títulos, descripciones, tono.
books.md:
# HK23 · Etsy Shop Copy — ready to paste

## Shop title (under the shop name, ≤55 chars)
```
Raw surreal art prints — owls, faces, chaos. HK23 / JC Art.
```

## Shop announcement (top of your shop)
```
✦ HK23 — JC Art. Raw, surreal, hand-directed AI art: folk owls, expressionist faces, psychedelic portraits, street graffiti and cosmic worlds. Every piece is an instant digital download — print it any size, anywhere. New drops often. Welcome to the universe.
```

## About section (your story)
```
I'm JC — the artist behind HK23.

HK23 is a universe. Owls in geometric forests, faces made of storm and ink, psychedelic dreamers, neon circuit-gods, wildstyle graffiti. Controlled chaos. The image as philosophy.

Every piece starts as a vision and is shaped by hand and machine into something that feels alive — raw, unfiltered, unmistakably mine. Nothing generic. Nothing reproducible.

What you'll find here: high-resolution digital art prints you download instantly and print at any size — at home, a local shop, or any print service. Frame it, hang it, live with it.

This is just the beginning. The collection grows constantly. If a piece speaks to you, take it — and become part of the universe.

— JC · HK23
```

## Shop policies (digital downloads)
**Returns & exchanges:** Because these are instant digital downloads, all sales are final — no returns, exchanges or cancellations once the file is delivered. If you have any issue with your file, message me and I'll make it right.

**Delivery:** Instant. Your high-resolution file(s) are available to download immediately after purchase — no physical item is shipped.

**Usage / license:** For personal use only. You may print for yourself and your home. You may **not** resell, redistribute, or use the artwork commercially. All artwork © HK23 / JC Art.

**Printing:** Files are provided in common frame ratios. Print at home, at a local print shop, or via any online print service. Colors may vary slightly by screen and printer.

## FAQ (optional, paste as listing FAQs)
- **Will I receive a physical print?** No — this is a digital download. You print it yourself.
- **What sizes can I print?** Common frame ratios are included; print small to large. Higher resolution = larger crisp prints.
- **Can I use this commercially?** No, personal use only. Reach out for licensing.
- **Refunds?** Digital items can't be returned, but message me if anything's wrong.

---

## ⚠️ Image quality note (important)
The JPGs in this folder (`etsy-exports/HK23-mj-01.jpg` … `mj-10.jpg`) are **624px** — perfect as the **listing preview photo** to get your shop live today, but **too small to sell as a print deliverable**.

For the actual file the buyer downloads, use the **full-resolution originals (1856×2464)** from your Midjourney library. Tell me which originals match listings mj-01…mj-10 and I'll convert them to print-ready JPGs.
